findings.issue: User-spec acceptance criterion 'retained,KiB корректен и на primary, и на standby (recovery-aware WAL-функция)' is not carried forward as a distinct AC line. The physical-slot AC asserts retained,KiB is non-NULL, but the primary-vs-standby recovery-awareness is a separate user-facing criterion (verified only via live TUI on a standby — i.e. not_verifiable by the automated suite).
findings.fix: Add an explicit AC line: '`retained,KiB` recovery-aware — correct on primary (pg_current_wal_lsn) and standby (pg_last_wal_receive_lsn)', marked not_verifiable / deferred-to-post-deploy (needs a live standby). The Edge cases / Verification Steps already cover deferred visual checks, but this criterion should appear in the consolidated AC list so it is not silently dropped.
